today.name: Tommy Emmanuel with Jack Schneider
today.description: Legendary Australian fingerstyle guitarist Tommy Emmanuel brings his masterful acoustic guitar skills to Seattle. Known for his energetic performances and technical brilliance.

today.name: Bloodywood: System Of A Brown Tour 2026
today.description: Indian metal band Bloodywood brings their unique blend of heavy metal and Indian folk music to Seattle. High-energy show featuring traditional instruments mixed with modern metal.

today.name: Grag Queen with Bright Light Bright Light
today.description: Brazilian drag queen and singer Grag Queen, winner of Queen of the Universe, brings her pop performance to Capitol Hill with special guest Bright Light Bright Light.

today.name: Flyte with Samantha Crain
today.description: London-based indie folk band Flyte performs with Oklahoma singer-songwriter Samantha Crain. Intimate evening of thoughtful lyrics and melodic indie rock.

this_weekend.name: Goldfinger with Broadway Calls & Sullvn
this_weekend.description: Legendary ska-punk band Goldfinger brings their energetic live show to The Showbox. Known for hits like 'Here in Your Bedroom' and 'Superman.' 21+ show.

this_weekend.name: Zarna Garg: Million Dollar Excuses
this_weekend.description: Comedian Zarna Garg brings her stand-up show 'Million Dollar Excuses' to Seattle. Her comedy blends cultural insights with sharp observations on family and modern life.

this_weekend.name: Aha Mele Hawaiian Festival
this_weekend.description: Annual Hawaiian cultural festival celebrating spring with live music, hula performances, authentic Hawaiian food, vendors, workshops, and kids' activities. 11 AM - 7 PM.

this_weekend.name: Bethel Music
this_weekend.description: Contemporary worship collective Bethel Music brings their soulful and uplifting performance to Seattle. Evening of modern worship music and spiritual connection.

this_weekend.name: Ballard Farmers Market
this_weekend.description: Seattle's largest and most popular farmers market featuring local produce, artisan foods, crafts, and flowers. Open rain or shine, 9 AM - 2 PM. Spring produce now in season!

this_weekend.name: Fremont Sunday Market
this_weekend.description: Seattle's favorite treasure hunt featuring local makers, vintage finds, antiques, and street food. Now in its spring/summer location on 34th Street. Open 10 AM - 4 PM.
